name: BriTROC-1 HGSOC Cohort
verbatim_evidence: Clinical outcome labels (PFI/platinum status) NOT in EGA dataset - external supplement required
sWGS; 679 samples / 265 subjects; 385 diagnosis + 294 relapse; longitudinal (up to 11 samples/subject)

attributes.namespace_note: JBLAB and IM are distinct specimen ID namespaces; each BAM = 1 unique specimen/MD5
attributes.temporal_evidence: Sample titles: 385 'diagnosis tumour DNA' + 294 'relapse tumour DNA'
attributes.note: Per-sample temporal marker (diagnosis/relapse) available at EGAN sample level; direct EGAN<->EGAF(BAM) row linkage NOT exposed by metadata API, so temporal not mapped to individual BAM specimens (honest)
